figures.caption: Table 2: Summary of F1 fertility per female over 7 days by genetic background, at the different 318 treatments. Means and number of females used to calculate F1 fertility. 319

Figure 6: (A) Reaction norms of estimated TUNEL-positive oocytes per ovariole, averaged across timepoints, shown for early (germarium + S1–7) and late (S8–14) oogenic stages under two temperature treatments and two oxygen levels. Lines represent genetic backgrounds. Colored lines indicate genotypes with a significant oxygen contrast within a given temperature and stage, while non-significant responses are shown in grey. (B) Representative image of oocytes stained with TUNEL (green) and TUNEL + DAPI (blue), highlighting cell death.
Table 5: Mixed-effects model results for the effects of oxygen, temperature, genetic background, and their 345 interactions on number of oocytes. 346
